name: ClawSight
description: WSInsight whole-slide pathology AI via Docker MCP server — tissue segmentation, GPU inference, spatial analytics, and export

mcpUrl.description: WSInsight MCP endpoint URL. Default: http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp

timeoutMs.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. Default: 300000 (5 minutes).

containerName.description: Default Docker container name. Default: clawsight-mcp.
